scripts.dev: npm run copy-pdf-worker && npm run copy-ort-wasm && next dev
scripts.build: npm run copy-pdf-worker && npm run copy-ort-wasm && next build
scripts.copy-ort-wasm: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src=p.dirname(require.resolve('onnxruntime-web'));const dst='public/ort';fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});const files=['ort-wasm-simd-threaded.wasm','ort-wasm-simd-threaded.mjs','ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.wasm','ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.mjs'];for(const f of files){fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f));}console.log('copied',files.length,'ort-web wasm files to',dst);"
